drawPenguin.name: Draw the symmetrical penguin
drawPenguin.description: Complete the penguin drawing by adding the missing parts to make it symmetrical.

makePenguinSymmetrical.name: Make the penguin symmetrical
makePenguinSymmetrical.description: Fix all the TODO comments to make the penguin symmetrical.

whereToStart.question: Where do I start?
whereToStart.answer: Work through the TODO comments one at a time, starting from the top.

symmetryOnCanvas.question: How does symmetry work on the canvas?
symmetryOnCanvas.answer: If something's left edge is 20, its symmetrical right edge will be 80 (100 - 20).

noseTrouble.question: Why can't I get the nose to work?
noseTrouble.answer: You shouldn't add a new triangle for the nose - instead you should CHANGE the existing triangle to work correctly. You only need to change ONE value.

rectangle.description: Draw a rectangle at position (left, top) with the given width, height, and color

circle.description: Draw a circle centered at (centerX, centerY) with the given radius and color

ellipse.description: Draw an ellipse centered at (centerX, centerY) with horizontal and vertical radii and color

triangle.description: Draw a triangle with three corner points and a color
